title: Meaty Mustardy Russian Beef Pilaf
description: A hearty Russian dish featuring lean minced beef and a tangy mustard flavor, perfect for a satisfying brunch

ingredients.name: lean minced beef
ingredients.notes: use vegan beef substitute for vegan option

ingredients.name: lardons
ingredients.notes: use vegan lardons for vegan option

ingredients.name: cheddar cheese
ingredients.notes: use vegan cheese for vegan option

instructions: Render the lardons in a large skillet over medium heat until crispy
Remove the lardons from the skillet and set aside
Add the vegetable oil to the skillet and saute the onion and garlic until softened
Add the lean minced beef to the skillet and cook until browned
Add the mustard to the skillet and stir to combine
Add the rice to the skillet and stir to combine
Add the vegetable broth to the skillet and bring to a boil
Reduce the heat to low and simmer until the liquid is absorbed and the rice is tender
Stir in the cheddar cheese until melted and well combined
Serve the pilaf hot, topped with the crispy lardons
